title: checked_sub returning a result-shaped Opt
statement: From docs/basket/spec-arena.md bounds discipline. Define `enum Opt[T] { ok Some(T), None }` and `fn checked_sub(a: u32, b: u32) -> Opt[u32]` that returns `Opt::None` when `a < b` (would underflow) and `Opt::Some(a - b)` otherwise. Expected failure is an error value, never a fault. Define only these items.
